name: Mockingbirdmon

signature_move.name: Iron Inhaler
signature_move.description: Pierces the enemy with its sharp beak and drains their life energy.

description: A Machine Digimon modeled after a bird. At first glance, it looks like a large-winged Bird Digimon that flies gracefully, but in actuality, what appears to be its head and legs are all robotic arms with beak-like functions. It can move these arms freely, using them in various capacities like laser shooting or capturing the opponent. In addition, the two giant Search Eyes equipped to the base of its wings possess excellent detection capabilities, allowing it to find even Digimon hidden in the shadows or underground. It doesn't just excel in maneuverability and combat ability. It also has a cunning side that specializes in mimetic behavior; this includes recording the sounds of the Digimon it encounters, and throwing the enemy off guard by reproducing those sounds when hunting. Once it has spotted its prey, it uses its robotic arms to corner them with strange movements far removed from its bird appearance. It is truly a hunter of the sky that makes full use of all of its abilities to track down its prey. Its Special Moves are piercing the enemy with its sharp beak and draining their life energy ( Iron Inhaler ), and shooting lasers while spinning rapidly in an attempt to capture the enemy with its three arms ( Tri-Airbots ).
